Healthcare.political_proposal: Implement Medicare for All by funding it through a progressive income tax on individuals earning over $500,000 annually.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a Political Action Committee (PAC) exclusively dedicated to electing candidates who support tax-funded universal healthcare.
Sign a public open letter to Congress, publishing your full name and employer, explicitly demanding the tax increase on high earners to fund Medicare for All.
Pledge to withhold your vote from any incumbent politician in the next primary who refuses to co-sponsor the specific legislation taxing incomes over $500,000.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Establish a public option for health insurance and allow individuals to choose between private plans and a government-run option.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a grassroots lobbying organization dedicated exclusively to drafting and passing public option legislation.
Publish a signed op-ed in a local newspaper explicitly endorsing the government-run option and challenging local representatives to support it.
Sign a pledge to withhold your vote from any candidate in the upcoming primary election who does not co-sponsor the public option bill.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA) and replace it with a market-based healthcare system that eliminates subsidies, reduces Medicaid expansion, removes the individual mandate, and introduces income-based tax credits for private insurance.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 of your personal funds to a conservative super PAC specifically dedicated to running attack ads against legislators who support preserving the ACA.
Publish a statement on your primary professional social media account (e.g., LinkedIn) explicitly endorsing the repeal of the ACA and arguing for reduced Medicaid spending.
Sign a binding voter pledge stating you will withhold your vote from any candidate, regardless of party affiliation, who does not commit to a full repeal of the Affordable Care Act.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Increase federal funding for mental health services by 30% to expand access and reduce stigma.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a dedicated lobbying group focused exclusively on passing the legislation to increase federal mental health funding.
Publish a signed op-ed in a local newspaper explicitly endorsing the 30% funding increase under your full legal name.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor the mental health funding bill.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Allow individuals in non-expansion states to buy into Medicaid to close coverage gaps.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a grassroots lobbying organization dedicated exclusively to passing Medicaid buy-in legislation in your state.
Publish a signed letter to the editor in your local newspaper explicitly criticizing state leadership for blocking the Medicaid buy-in option.
Commit to withholding your vote from your current party's candidate if they do not publicly endorse the Medicaid buy-in plan before the upcoming election.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Impose prescription drug price caps by tying essential medications (such as insulin) to international reference pricing.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a patient advocacy group specifically lobbying Congress to enact international reference pricing legislation.
Sign a public open letter addressed to legislators demanding drug price caps, which will be published in a major newspaper with your full name and job title included.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next primary election who accepts campaign contributions from pharmaceutical companies opposing this regulation.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Fund a nationwide 24/7 mental health hotline and provide short-term counseling sessions for all residents.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit advocacy group specifically focused on lobbying legislators to pass the mental health funding bill.
Publish a signed open letter on your personal social media profiles urging your local representatives to adopt the proposal immediately.
Sign a pledge to vote exclusively for candidates who list universal mental health coverage as a top-three priority in their official platform, regardless of party affiliation.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Require employers to provide a minimum number of paid sick days per year.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit organization specifically lobbying for the passage of the paid sick leave mandate.
Publish a post on your professional LinkedIn profile publicly endorsing the mandate and calling on your network to support it.
Sign a pledge to vote exclusively for candidates who co-sponsor the paid sick leave bill in the upcoming election, regardless of party affiliation.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Guarantee abortion rights at the federal level to override state restrictions.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to the Center for Reproductive Rights to specifically fund federal litigation against state-level abortion bans.
Sign a public open letter demanding federal codification of abortion rights using your full legal name and employer affiliation, to be published in a national newspaper.
Pledge to withhold your vote from any political candidate in the upcoming general election who does not explicitly endorse the Women's Health Protection Act.

Healthcare.political_proposal: Enforce a total ban on abortion nationwide at all stages.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a national lobbying organization specifically dedicated to drafting and passing federal legislation for a total abortion ban.
Post a signed public statement on your personal social media profiles explicitly calling for the criminalization of abortion without exceptions.
Sign a voter pledge committing to vote against any candidate in the upcoming primary election who refuses to support a total federal ban on abortion.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Provide a Universal Basic Income (UBI) of $1,200 per month for all adult citizens, funded through carbon and corporate taxes.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a dedicated lobbying group specifically working to draft and pass this UBI legislation.
Publish a signed statement on your primary social media account explicitly endorsing the necessary corporate tax hikes to fund the UBI.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the next election, regardless of party, if they do not co-sponsor this UBI bill.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Implement a national paid family leave policy that offers up to 12 weeks of paid leave for parents and caregivers, funded by payroll taxes.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a grassroots lobbying organization specifically dedicated to passing the national paid family leave legislation.
Publish a signed op-ed on your professional LinkedIn profile explicitly endorsing the necessary payroll tax increase to fund the 12-week leave program.
Sign a pledge to withhold your vote from any candidate in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the paid family leave bill.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Privatize Social Security by allowing individuals to invest a portion of their payroll taxes in private retirement accounts.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 of your personal funds to a lobbying group dedicated to passing legislation that establishes private Social Security accounts.
Share a public post on your primary social media profile explicitly endorsing the privatization of Social Security, visible to all your family and colleagues.
Sign a constituent pledge stating you will vote against any incumbent representative in the next primary election who refuses to support partial Social Security privatization.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Expand the Child Tax Credit and make it fully refundable to reduce child poverty.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a specialized advocacy fund dedicated solely to lobbying Congress for the permanent expansion of the Child Tax Credit.
Post a public video statement on your primary social media account explicitly endorsing the policy and tagging your local representatives.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent politician in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor the CTC expansion bill.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Adopt a negative income tax that replaces many existing welfare programs with a guaranteed minimum income administered through tax returns.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a specialized economic policy think tank specifically dedicated to drafting and lobbying for Negative Income Tax legislation.
Sign a public open letter to Congress, including your full legal name and employer, arguing that current welfare bureaucracies are failures and must be dismantled in favor of a Negative Income Tax.
Pledge to vote exclusively for candidates who publicly commit to replacing existing welfare systems with a Negative Income Tax, crossing party lines if necessary.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Offer free universal Pre-K for children ages 3-5, funded by federal and state governments.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the 'National Head Start Association' specifically earmarked for lobbying efforts to pass universal Pre-K legislation.
Sign a public open letter to your local newspaper using your full legal name and home address, endorsing the specific tax increases required to fund this program.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor the Universal Pre-K Act, regardless of their stance on other issues.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Establish a national service program requiring 1-2 years of civilian or military service, incentivized with college tuition assistance.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to 'Service First,' a lobbying organization dedicated exclusively to drafting and passing mandatory national service legislation.
Post a public video statement on your personal social media profile endorsing the mandatory service requirement and tagging your local representative.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent politician in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the National Service Act.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Provide free breakfast and lunch to every K-12 student.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit advocacy group dedicated exclusively to lobbying legislators for the passage of universal school meal funding.
Publish a signed op-ed in a local newspaper explicitly endorsing a property tax increase to finance free meals for all district students.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent school board member or legislator who opposes universal free lunch, regardless of their party affiliation.

Social Welfare & Family.political_proposal: Guarantee a federal job at a living wage to all who are willing and able to work, primarily in the public or nonprofit sectors.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a grassroots lobbying organization dedicated exclusively to drafting and passing the Federal Job Guarantee legislation.
Post a permanent public statement on your professional LinkedIn profile endorsing the Federal Job Guarantee, accepting potential controversy with current or future employers.
Sign a pledge to vote against any political candidate in the upcoming primary elections, regardless of party affiliation, who does not publicly sponsor the job guarantee bill.

Education.political_proposal: Increase public education funding by 25% to reduce class sizes, raise teacher salaries, and improve school infrastructure.

actions.action_description: Donate $200 directly to a Political Action Committee (PAC) specifically formed to lobby legislators for the passage of this funding bill.
Publish a signed op-ed in a local newspaper explicitly endorsing the tax hikes required to fund the proposal, publicly accepting the increased financial burden on your own household.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the next election—regardless of party affiliation—if they fail to co-sponsor the education funding legislation.

Education.political_proposal: Implement school choice initiatives, including vouchers and charter expansions, by reallocating $50 billion from federal education grants.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 immediately to 'The School Choice Coalition,' a lobbying group dedicated to passing federal voucher legislation.
Sign a public petition using your full legal name and address, which will be published online and delivered to the Department of Education, explicitly supporting the funding reallocation.
Send a formal letter to your congressional representative stating that your vote in the upcoming election is conditional entirely upon their support for this specific school choice bill.

Education.political_proposal: Establish a nationwide school voucher system that allows public education funds to be used for private and charter schools.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 of your personal income to 'The School Choice Coalition,' a lobbying group dedicated to passing voucher legislation.
Record and publish a 2-minute video on your personal social media profiles explicitly endorsing the diversion of public funds to private schools, tagging your local school board members.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent politician in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the 'National Educational Freedom Act'.

Education.political_proposal: Offer universal free college at public institutions, funded by federal or state programs.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a specialized lobbying group dedicated exclusively to drafting and passing legislation for tuition-free public universities.
Publish a signed statement on your primary social media account explicitly endorsing higher taxes to fund universal college education.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the next primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the universal free college bill.

Education.political_proposal: Cancel some or all federal student loan debt, up to a certain threshold.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit advocacy group specifically dedicated to lobbying Congress for immediate student loan forgiveness.
Sign a public petition using your full legal name and share it on your professional LinkedIn profile to show visible support for debt cancellation.
Sign a binding pledge to withhold your vote in the next primary election from any candidate who does not include student loan cancellation in their official platform.

Education.political_proposal: Abolish the Department of Education and return authority over education to states and localities.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a political action committee (PAC) exclusively dedicated to lobbying Congress for the dismantling of the Department of Education.
Publish an op-ed in a local newspaper under your full name arguing that federal education oversight creates bureaucratic waste and harms local students.
Pledge to vote for a primary challenger against your current Congress member if the incumbent refuses to co-sponsor legislation terminating the Department of Education.

Education.political_proposal: Create mandatory national curriculum standards for core subjects like math, science, and history.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to 'United for Standards,' a lobbying group dedicated to drafting and passing federal legislation for a unified national curriculum.
Sign a public open letter addressed to the Department of Education demanding the federalization of school standards, which will be published online with your full name and city.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent school board member in the next election who opposes the adoption of federal education standards.

Education.political_proposal: Require colleges and universities to meet specific admissions targets or quotas for underrepresented groups.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal advocacy group dedicated to litigating cases that mandate diversity quotas in higher education.
Publish a signed statement on your professional social media profile explicitly endorsing mandatory admissions quotas for underrepresented groups.
Pledge to vote exclusively for university board of trustee candidates who commit to implementing binding admissions targets for underrepresented minorities.

Education.political_proposal: Ban the teaching of certain 'divisive concepts' (often labeled Critical Race Theory) in K-12 curricula.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal defense fund supporting parents suing school districts over the inclusion of 'divisive concepts' in the curriculum.
Speak publicly for three minutes during the open comment section of a local school board meeting to demand the prohibition of specific curricular materials.
Sign a pledge to vote exclusively for school board candidates who have explicitly committed to banning Critical Race Theory from the classroom, regardless of their other qualifications.

Education.political_proposal: Expand funding for school resource officers to place police in every public school to enhance security.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a lobbying fund specifically dedicated to passing legislation that mandates police officers in all public schools.
Write and publish a signed op-ed in the local newspaper arguing that schools without police officers are unsafe for children.
Sign a pledge to vote exclusively for school board candidates who have committed to increasing the budget for school resource officers.

Labor & Workplace.political_proposal: Raise the federal minimum wage to $15 per hour by 2025 and adjust it for inflation thereafter.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 directly to a grassroots organization dedicated to lobbying Congress for the minimum wage increase.
Publish a signed statement on your professional LinkedIn profile publicly endorsing the $15/hour wage mandate.
Sign a binding voter pledge to vote against any incumbent in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor the wage increase bill.

Labor & Workplace.political_proposal: Strengthen labor unions by passing the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act to ensure workers can form and join unions freely.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the AFL-CIO's advocacy fund specifically to finance advertisements supporting the passage of the PRO Act.
Publish a signed open letter on your professional social media profiles explicitly demanding that your current employer publicly endorse the PRO Act.
Sign a 'single-issue voter' pledge stating you will vote against any incumbent politician in the next election who has not publicly committed to voting 'Yes' on the PRO Act.

Labor & Workplace.political_proposal: Prohibit states from enforcing right-to-work laws, allowing unions to collect dues from all represented workers.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a national labor advocacy fund dedicated specifically to lobbying for the repeal of Right-to-Work legislation.
Sign a public open letter to Congress demanding the end of Right-to-Work laws, consenting to have your full name and current employer listed on the campaign's website.
Pledge to withhold your vote in the upcoming primary election from any candidate who refuses to co-sponsor the PRO Act (Protecting the Right to Organize Act).

Labor & Workplace.political_proposal: Ban non-compete clauses in most employment contracts to promote labor mobility.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal defense fund specifically established to defend low-wage workers currently being sued by former employers for non-compete violations.
Publish a post on your professional LinkedIn profile explicitly calling for the abolition of non-competes, allowing current and future employers to see your stance.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor the 'Workforce Mobility Act'.

Labor & Workplace.political_proposal: Classify gig economy workers as employees with access to benefits and wage/hour protections.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal defense fund supporting gig workers suing for employee reclassification.
Sign a public petition with your full name and employer listed, demanding the Department of Labor enforce employee status for app-based workers.
Pledge to boycott all ride-share and delivery apps until they voluntarily provide health insurance and minimum wage guarantees to their drivers.

Labor & Workplace.political_proposal: Restrict collective bargaining rights for public-sector unions such as teachers, police, and firefighters.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal defense fund specifically dedicated to challenging the constitutionality of mandatory public-sector union fees in court.
Sign and publicly share a petition on your personal social media account demanding that the state legislature remove binding arbitration privileges for police and teacher unions.
Write a formal letter to your state representative pledging to vote against them in the next primary election if they fail to co-sponsor legislation limiting public union contract negotiations.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Lower the corporate tax rate from 21% to 15%, close loopholes, and regulate offshore tax havens.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to the 'Competitive & Fair Tax Alliance,' a lobbying group dedicated to passing legislation that lowers statutory rates while strictly enforcing offshore tax compliance.
Sign a public open letter to Congress, published in a national newspaper with your full name and employer listed, endorsing the 15% tax rate and the elimination of offshore loopholes.

Pledge to vote exclusively for primary candidates who sign a binding commitment to lower the corporate tax rate to 15% and support the regulation of offshore tax havens, regardless of their stance on other issues.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Impose a 15% flat tax on all income levels and eliminate deductions and credits to simplify the tax code.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a lobbying group dedicated exclusively to promoting the 15% flat tax legislation.
Post a public video statement on your personal social media profile explicitly calling for the elimination of all tax deductions.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next primary who does not publicly endorse the flat tax proposal.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Roll back Dodd-Frank regulations to deregulate the financial sector and give banks more freedom to operate.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a free-market lobbying group specifically earmarked for a campaign to repeal Dodd-Frank provisions.
Sign a public open letter tailored for the Senate Banking Committee, consenting to have your full name and employer listed in a national newspaper advertisement supporting financial deregulation.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next primary election who supports maintaining current banking regulations, regardless of their alignment with your views on other issues.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Abolish federal income taxes and replace them with a 15% national sales tax on all goods and services.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a specialized lobbying group dedicated exclusively to drafting and promoting the national sales tax legislation.
Publish a signed statement on your primary professional social media profile (e.g., LinkedIn) explicitly endorsing the abolition of the IRS in favor of a consumption tax.
Sign a binding voter pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next primary election who has not co-sponsored the national sales tax bill.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Enter a comprehensive trade agreement with the European Union that eliminates tariffs while enforcing labor and environmental standards.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the 'Trans-Atlantic Commerce Coalition,' a lobbying group dedicated to fast-tracking the ratification of this specific trade agreement.
Sign your full legal name to a public open letter published in a national newspaper urging the government to finalize the trade agreement immediately.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against your current representative in the next primary election if they vote against this trade agreement.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Adopt a balanced budget amendment that requires a balanced federal budget each year except in emergencies or wartime.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a lobbying group dedicated exclusively to advocating for the ratification of the Balanced Budget Amendment.
Publish a signed op-ed in a local newspaper explicitly arguing for the necessity of a constitutional amendment to limit federal spending.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next election, regardless of party, if they fail to co-sponsor the amendment.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Impose an annual wealth tax of 2-3% on net wealth over $50 million to reduce inequality.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit advocacy group dedicated specifically to lobbying Congress for the passage of the wealth tax bill.
Sign a public open letter addressed to national leadership demanding the wealth tax, allowing your full name and city to be published in a major newspaper advertisement.
Pledge to vote exclusively for candidates who publicly endorse the wealth tax, withholding support from any party nominee who remains neutral or opposed.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Enact a windfall profits tax on corporations with exceptionally high profit margins during crises.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a grassroots lobbying organization dedicated specifically to drafting and passing the windfall profits tax legislation.
Sign a public open letter addressed to the Treasury Department demanding the tax, agreeing to have your full name and profession published in a national newspaper advertisement.
Pledge to withhold your vote from any incumbent legislator who has received campaign contributions from corporations that would be subject to this tax.

Economy & Taxes.political_proposal: Cap the ratio of CEO or executive pay to median worker salary at a fixed multiple (such as 50:1).

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a lobbying group specifically dedicated to drafting and passing legislation that mandates the 50:1 executive pay cap.
Publish a signed statement on your professional LinkedIn profile publicly calling for your own employer to adopt a 50:1 pay ratio immediately.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any political candidate in the upcoming primary election who does not explicitly endorse the executive pay cap proposal.

Immigration.political_proposal: Enact comprehensive immigration reform based on the 2013 Bipartisan Act, offering a pathway to citizenship, stronger border security, and streamlined visas.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a bipartisan lobbying group dedicated solely to advancing the legislative framework of the 2013 immigration act.
Publish a signed op-ed in your local newspaper explicitly endorsing the 2013 framework's pathway to citizenship and border security measures.
Sign a pledge to withhold your vote from any candidate in the upcoming primary election who does not publicly commit to co-sponsoring this specific comprehensive reform bill.

Immigration.political_proposal: Build a physical border wall, deport undocumented immigrants en masse, and severely restrict legal immigration.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a political action committee specifically dedicated to funding border wall construction and lobbying for reduced immigration quotas.
Sign a public petition using your full name and city of residence demanding immediate mass deportations and the suspension of asylum programs.
Pledge to vote exclusively for candidates who commit to a 'zero-tolerance' immigration platform, even if it means crossing party lines or ignoring other policy preferences.

Immigration.political_proposal: Abolish Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and distribute its functions among other agencies.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the 'Detention Watch Network', a non-profit organization explicitly dedicated to abolishing immigration detention and dismantling ICE.
Sign a public open letter addressed to Congress demanding the dissolution of ICE, agreeing to have your full name and city of residence published in a national newspaper advertisement.
Pledge to vote exclusively for primary candidates who have publicly committed to co-sponsoring legislation to abolish ICE, regardless of their other policy positions.

Immigration.political_proposal: Switch legal immigration to a points-based system that emphasizes skills, education, and language proficiency.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a lobbying group dedicated exclusively to drafting and passing legislation that implements a merit-based immigration framework.

Sign a public open letter addressed to national legislators advocating for the replacement of family-reunification visas with a skills-based points system, knowing your name will be published in a major newspaper.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the bill introducing the points-based immigration system.

Immigration.political_proposal: Allow visa-free entry from certain neighboring countries for a set period to measure economic and social effects.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a non-profit advocacy group specifically organized to lobby parliament for the authorization of the visa-free pilot program.
Sign a public petition endorsing the visa-free entry trial that will be published in a major national newspaper, including your full name and city of residence.
Commit to voting for a specific candidate in the next local election primarily because they have explicitly promised to support the implementation of this border policy experiment.

Immigration.political_proposal: Require all employers to use E-Verify to check work eligibility and penalize those who hire undocumented workers.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a lobbying group dedicated to strictly enforcing E-Verify mandates and prosecuting non-compliant employers.
Sign a public petition using your full legal name and address demanding that local authorities audit businesses for E-Verify compliance.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent politician in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor legislation requiring mandatory E-Verify.

Gun Policy.political_proposal: Ban assault weapons and high-capacity magazines nationwide, require universal background checks, and mandate waiting periods.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 of your personal funds to a prominent gun control advocacy group dedicated to lobbying Congress for the assault weapons ban.
Publish a signed public statement on your professional social media profile explicitly endorsing the ban on assault weapons and calling for strict background checks.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any candidate in the upcoming election, regardless of party affiliation, who does not co-sponsor legislation banning high-capacity magazines.

Gun Policy.political_proposal: Allow national constitutional carry, permitting anyone who can legally own a firearm to carry openly or concealed without a permit.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a gun rights lobbying organization specifically earmarked for a campaign to pass federal constitutional carry legislation.
Publish a signed op-ed in your local newspaper arguing that carrying firearms without a government permit is a fundamental constitutional right.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the National Constitutional Carry Act.

Gun Policy.political_proposal: Offer a federal gun buyback program to reduce the total number of firearms in circulation.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit organization specifically dedicated to financing and organizing voluntary community gun buyback events.
Sign a public open letter addressed to Congress urging the passage of federal buyback legislation, consenting to have your full name and city published in a national newspaper advertisement.
Contact your Congressional representative to formally register a pledge that you will vote against them in the next primary election if they do not co-sponsor the gun buyback bill.

Gun Policy.political_proposal: Expand firearm ownership bans to individuals with domestic violence misdemeanors or restraining orders.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal advocacy fund dedicated to lobbying Congress to close the 'boyfriend loophole' in federal gun laws.
Sign a public open letter, visible to your employer and community, demanding that local law enforcement strictly enforce firearm surrender for those with active restraining orders.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent representative who opposes extending firearm bans to domestic violence misdemeanants, regardless of their alignment with your views on other issues.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Legalize recreational marijuana nationwide and use tax revenues to fund substance abuse programs.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to the National Organization for the Reform of Marijuana Laws (NORML) to specifically support their federal lobbying efforts.
Sign a public open letter to Congress using your full legal name and employer affiliation, urging the immediate passage of the legalization act.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the legislation, regardless of their political party.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Eliminate mandatory minimum sentences for non-violent offenses, decriminalize marijuana, and invest in rehabilitation and reentry programs.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to the Drug Policy Alliance to directly fund lobbying efforts for sentencing reform and rehabilitation initiatives.
Publish a signed letter to the editor in your local newspaper explicitly calling for the end of mandatory minimums and the decriminalization of marijuana.
Pledge to vote exclusively for candidates who legally co-sponsor legislation to end mandatory minimum sentences, regardless of their party affiliation.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Broaden the death penalty to cover more crimes and impose harsher punishments for severe offenses.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to 'Justice for Victims,' a lobbying group dedicated to passing legislation that expands the list of capital offenses.
Sign a public open letter, using your full real name and city, demanding that local prosecutors seek the death penalty in all eligible cases.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent politician who has previously voted to commute a death sentence or restrict capital punishment, regardless of their other policies.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Abolish the death penalty at the federal level and incentivize states to follow suit.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the National Coalition to Abolish the Death Penalty to support lobbying efforts and legal defense funds.
Publish a statement on your personal social media profiles (visible to family and employers) condemning capital punishment as a human rights violation.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator who opposes the Federal Death Penalty Abolition Act, regardless of their party affiliation.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Redirect or reduce police budgets to social services, mental health, and community initiatives ('defund the police').

actions.action_description: Donate $100 of your personal savings to a grassroots organization specifically lobbying for the divestment of municipal police funds.
Publish an op-ed in a local newspaper under your full legal name arguing for the immediate reduction of the police department's budget.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent city council member who approves an increase or maintenance of the current police budget, regardless of their stance on other issues.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Enforce mandatory minimum sentences for hate crimes motivated by race, religion, sexual orientation, or other protected categories.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a legal advocacy group dedicated exclusively to lobbying for stricter federal sentencing guidelines for hate crime convictions.
Sign a public open letter, listing your full name and employer, that demands local legislators adopt mandatory minimums for bias-motivated offenses.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the next primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the 'Hate Crime Sentencing Enhancement Act'.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: End qualified immunity to make law enforcement officers personally liable in civil lawsuits.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a legal defense fund specifically dedicated to financing civil rights lawsuits against police officers protected by qualified immunity.
Publish a permanent, signed op-ed or social media post on your primary account explicitly demanding the abolition of qualified immunity and tagging your local police union.
Sign a voter pledge committing to vote against any incumbent legislator in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the bill ending qualified immunity.

Criminal Justice & Policing.political_proposal: Ban government use of facial recognition technology to protect privacy and civil liberties.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 of your personal funds to the Electronic Frontier Foundation (EFF) specifically earmarked for legal defense funds against government surveillance.
Publish a signed open letter on your primary professional social media account (e.g., LinkedIn) condemning specific local law enforcement agencies for deploying facial recognition tools.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the upcoming election, regardless of party affiliation, if they do not co-sponsor the legislation to ban facial recognition.

Environment & Energy.political_proposal: Enact a $2 trillion Green New Deal over ten years to transition to renewable energy, create green jobs, and reach net-zero carbon by 2035.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 today to a climate action PAC specifically dedicated to funding primary challenges against legislators who oppose the Green New Deal.

Publish a signed post on your professional LinkedIn profile explicitly endorsing the $2 trillion spending package and the net-zero 2035 target, making your stance visible to all employers and colleagues.
Sign a 'No Climate, No Vote' pledge promising to withhold your vote from any candidate, regardless of party affiliation, who does not publicly commit to the full Green New Deal platform.

Environment & Energy.political_proposal: Impose a $50-per-ton carbon tax on coal and natural gas industries while tightening environmental regulations.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the 'Climate Action Fund' specifically to hire lobbyists to push this carbon tax legislation through Congress.
Sign a public declaration supporting the tax that will be published in a national newspaper advertisement including your full name and city of residence.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent representative in the upcoming primary election, regardless of party affiliation, if they do not co-sponsor this carbon tax bill.

Environment & Energy.political_proposal: Phase out all coal power plants by 2030 and shift to renewables like wind and solar.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to a specialized environmental lobbying group dedicated to drafting and passing legislation for the mandatory coal phase-out.
Publish a signed op-ed in your local newspaper demanding the closure of regional coal plants, explicitly accepting the potential backlash from community members employed by the industry.

China & Asia-Pacific.political_proposal: Join with allies to create a competing global infrastructure fund to rival China's Belt and Road Initiative in Asia, Africa, and Latin America.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a specialized foreign policy think tank dedicated to lobbying Congress for increased international development funding to counter Chinese influence.
Sign a public open letter to the State Department urging the creation of the fund, agreeing to have your full name and city of residence published on the campaign's website.
Pledge to vote exclusively for candidates in the upcoming primary election who explicitly endorse increasing the foreign affairs budget to compete with the Belt and Road Initiative.

China & Asia-Pacific.political_proposal: Grant expedited visas or refugee status to Hong Kong residents fleeing political persecution under the National Security Law.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a non-profit legal defense fund specifically designated to cover the immigration processing fees for Hong Kong asylum seekers.
Post a permanent statement on your personal LinkedIn and Facebook profiles explicitly demanding increased refugee quotas for Hong Kong residents, tagging your local political representatives.
Sign a pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the Hong Kong Safe Harbor Act.

China & Asia-Pacific.political_proposal: Restrict visas for Chinese graduate students in sensitive STEM fields to safeguard U.S. research and intellectual property.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a national security advocacy group specifically dedicated to lobbying Congress for stricter visa vetting protocols.
Sign a public open letter using your full legal name and current employer urging the State Department to suspend STEM visas for Chinese nationals.
Pledge to vote against your current political party's candidate in the next primary if they refuse to support legislation restricting foreign student access to sensitive research.

China & Asia-Pacific.political_proposal: Engage in direct diplomatic talks with China to establish a bilateral cyber-espionage ceasefire and protect critical infrastructure.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the 'Global Cyber Stability Fund,' a non-profit organization that facilitates Track II diplomatic dialogues between US and Chinese cybersecurity officials.
Publish a statement on your professional LinkedIn profile explicitly endorsing a US-China cyber-truce, accepting the potential reputational risk among hawkish professional connections.
Sign a binding pledge to vote exclusively for congressional candidates who publicly commit to prioritizing diplomatic engagement over increased sanctions in the next primary election.

Agriculture & Food.political_proposal: Subsidize and provide technical assistance to farmers who transition to organic or sustainable practices.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to the 'Organic Transition Fund,' a non-profit that directly purchases equipment for farmers switching to sustainable methods.
Publish a signed letter to the editor in your local newspaper explicitly advocating for tax increases to fund organic farming subsidies.
Sign a binding pledge to withhold your vote from any incumbent representative who votes against the Sustainable Agriculture Assistance Act.

Agriculture & Food.political_proposal: Impose tariffs on imported agricultural products that fail to meet U.S. environmental and labor standards.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to the 'Fair Trade Coalition,' an advocacy group actively lobbying Congress to draft and pass the environmental tariff legislation.
Sign a public petition that will be published in a full-page national newspaper advertisement, listing your full name and city as a supporter of the tariffs.
Pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the upcoming primary election who refuses to co-sponsor the bill imposing these specific agricultural tariffs.

Agriculture & Food.political_proposal: Invest $20 billion in agricultural research to develop drought-resistant and high-yield crop varieties.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to 'Global Harvest Research', a non-profit organization dedicated to funding genetic engineering for climate-resilient crops.
Post a video statement on your personal social media accounts publicly demanding your local representative support the $20 billion agricultural bill.
Sign a binding pledge to vote against any incumbent legislator in the next primary election who does not co-sponsor the agricultural research funding legislation.

Agriculture & Food.political_proposal: Expand a national farmers' market network with federal grants to bolster local food distribution systems.

actions.action_description: Donate $100 to the 'Local Food Systems Advocacy Fund' to support lobbying efforts for the federal grant legislation.
Post a permanent public statement on your professional LinkedIn profile endorsing the federal spending increase for farmers' markets.
Sign a pledge to withhold your vote from any congressional candidate who does not explicitly include the farmers' market expansion in their official platform.

Agriculture & Food.political_proposal: Offer incentives for grocery retailers that open new stores in food deserts to ensure access to fresh foods.

actions.action_description: Donate $50 to a community development fund dedicated specifically to subsidizing initial operational costs for new grocery markets in low-income neighborhoods.
Record and publish a video testimony on your personal social media profiles explicitly urging local officials to prioritize tax breaks for grocers in food deserts.
Sign a binding pledge to vote exclusively for city council candidates who have formally committed to sponsoring legislation that provides financial incentives for fresh food retailers.
